title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. lonchiphylloides
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. lonchiphylloides, also known as a subspecies of hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion-like plants within the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. lonchiphylloides include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. As an herbal remedy, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
